title: User Guide
text: This guide explains how to use the IS428 VABITeam interactive dashboard.

title: User Guide
text: This guide explains how to use the IS428 VABITeam interactive dashboard.

title: User Guide
text:
System Requirements

Modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge)
Internet connection
No installation required

title: User Guide
text:
Accessing the Dashboard

Go to your dashboard link
The dashboard will load automatically in your browser

title: User Guide
text:
Dashboard Features

1. Filters Panel



Filters Panel


Use the left-hand panel to filter data by:

Date Range — Select a start and end date
Category — Choose one or multiple categories
Region — Filter by geographic region



2. Main Chart Area



Main Chart



Hover over any data point to see detailed tooltips
Click a bar/point to drill down into that segment
Use the legend to show/hide specific series



3. Summary Cards



Summary Cards


The top row shows key metrics that update dynamically based on your filter selections.


4. Export

Click the Download button to export the current view as PNG or CSV

title: User Guide
text:
Troubleshooting







Issue
Solution




Dashboard not loading
Refresh the page or clear browser cache


Filters not responding
Try resetting filters using the Reset button


Charts appear blank
Check your internet connection

title: User Guide
text:
Contact
For questions or feedback, contact the team at is428vabiteam@smu.edu.sg

title: Analysis & Results

Data Preparation
Key steps taken to prepare the data:

Removed duplicates and null values
Normalised date formats
Joined multiple datasets on key ID
Derived new features (e.g. rolling averages)

title: Storyboard
text: The storyboard walks through the narrative of our visual analytics solution — from the user’s perspective.

title: Storyboard
text: The storyboard walks through the narrative of our visual analytics solution — from the user’s perspective.

title: Storyboard
text:
Scene 1: Landing Page



Scene 1


User Goal: Understand the overall summary at a glance.
What the user sees: A high-level dashboard with key metrics and filters.

title: Storyboard
text:
Scene 2: Exploratory View



Scene 2


User Goal: Drill down into a specific category or time period.
What the user sees: Interactive charts that respond to filter selections.

title: Storyboard
text:
Scene 3: Comparative Analysis



Scene 3


User Goal: Compare two or more groups side-by-side.
What the user sees: A split-panel view with synchronized tooltips.

title: Storyboard
text:
Scene 4: Insights & Export



Scene 4


User Goal: Extract insights and share findings.
What the user sees: A summary panel with download/export options.
